result:
All seven family members listed for `state_stub.rs` already have working overrides in `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState`. The trait defaults at lines 120/137/142/143/154/209/240 are dead code (Rust resolves to the inherent impl). `cargo build -p lua-cli` is green. The list provided was stale.

## Report

- **opt_arg_string** is at `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:142` (trait default — never dispatched) with a working override at `crates/lua-stdlib/src/state_stub.rs:410` that returns `def.to_vec()` on `None`/`Nil` arg, else `self.check_arg_string(arg)`.
- **Nothing to implement** — every state_stub.rs family member named in this ticket already has a real override in the `impl LuaStateStubExt for LuaState` block (lines 380–436). The harness's family list is stale (no edits needed, no fakes added).
- **Family members already implemented** (no work done by me this session):
  - `value_at` (line 384) — `push_value(idx); pop()`
  - `check_arg_type` (line 389) — type-mismatch arg error mapping
  - `arg_to_bool` (line 380) — delegates to `lua_vm::api::to_boolean`
  - `get_metafield` (line 417) — abs_index + `get_metatable` + `raw_get`
  - `table_get_i` (line 432) — delegates to `lua_vm::api::get_i`
  - `compare_lt` (line 436) — delegates to `lua_vm::api::compare(..,1)`
- **Out-of-scope todos noticed but NOT touched** (different files, ticket says stay in state_stub.rs): `new_tbc_upval` and `pretailcall` in `crates/lua-vm/src/state.rs`. The real current panic per `harness/impl/last_panic.txt` is in `crates/lua-vm/src/func.rs:224` — also out of scope.
- **`cargo build -p lua-cli`**: green (warnings only, no errors).
